headline: DoorDash Stock Jumps on Strong Earnings Report
summary: Shares of delivery service  DoorDash  popped 13% in after-hours trading Wednesday after it beat analysts expectations for its first-quarter earnings, even though it missed on revenue.  It reported earnings of 42 cents a share, handily beating expectations for 36 cents a share.  The company credited “continued product improvements and healthy consumer demand trends” for its solid results which come as consumers continue to face higher costs.
